title: Drawer
description: A panel that slides in from the edge of the screen, built on top of Vaul.

manual.title: Add utility function
manual.description: Create a cn utility function if you don't have one already.

manual.title: Copy the component code
manual.description: Create a new file and paste the drawer component code.

usage.import: import { Drawer, DrawerTrigger, DrawerContent, DrawerHeader, DrawerTitle, DrawerDescription, DrawerFooter, DrawerClose } from '@shery-ui/components';

examples.title: Default
examples.description: A basic drawer that slides in from the bottom.
examples.code:
import { Button, Drawer, DrawerClose, DrawerContent, DrawerDescription, DrawerFooter, DrawerHeader, DrawerTitle, DrawerTrigger, } from "@shery-ui/components"; export default function DrawerDemo() { return ( Drawer Title This is a drawer component that slides in from the bottom.

Drawer content goes here. You can add any content you want.

); }

examples.title: Directions
examples.description: Drawer can slide in from bottom, top, left, or right.
